title: INCLUSIVE DAY SERVICES - 211info
text: ALBERTINA KERR INCLUSIVE DAY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides recreational, social, and therapeutic services both on-site and in the community. Individuals can participate in arts and crafts, exercise programs, outdoor excursions, music exploration, and other group activities. The service is geared towards individuals wanting a day program who do not have employment prioritized. 424 NE 22nd Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older with a documented disability Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 239-8101 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 239-8101 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Social Security card, documentation of disability, lists of medications taken/dosage, medical and behavior protocol, and any special considerations AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Adult Day Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - I/DD EMPLOYMENT SERVICES EMPLOYMENT - VOCATIONAL SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RESIDENTIAL CARE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - ADULT GROUP HOMES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALBERTINA KERR
